text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Part D Formulary File Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 2.2 7 

GCDF 

LABEL: Dosage Form Code 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the dosage form code according to the First DataBank (FDB) reference files. The dosage 
form describes the physical presentation of a drug, such as tablet, capsule, or liquid. It may also 
incorporate the delivery and release mechanism of the drug. When this variable appears in the 
Formulary file, it is the
